name: Person Name (Pronoun/Role Reference)
description: Detects person names introduced via pronoun or role reference (e.g. 'His name was Sam Jones', 'The customer's name is John Smith'). Complements NER for terse or low-context inputs where NER confidence falls below threshold.

effect.message: Person name in pronoun/role reference replaced for de-identification

metadata.pattern_rationale: Matches pronoun ('his', 'her', 'their') or role phrase ('the customer's') followed by 'name is/was/will be/has been' and 1-3 TitleCase words. Uses [ \t]+ (not \s+) in the name word group to prevent newline-crossing. Priority 65 is below labeled_field_name (70) since this pattern is slightly less precise.
metadata.ner_relationship: Deterministic fallback for pronoun-context names where NER confidence is insufficient. If NER fires on the same span, labeled_field_name or NER at higher priority wins; otherwise this rule ensures coverage.
